subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-07-31
subcodes.first_line: You are all welcome. It is a source of great pleasure and we are indebted to Mrs. Parsons. I am a visitor from the Orient
subcodes.first_line_orig: من از مسس پارسنز بسیار ممنونم که سبب شده با شماها ملاقات و معاشرت میکنم
subcodes.subjects: @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @theodicy; the mystery of evil; of suffering, @unity; oneness of humanity, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @spiritual transformation, @East and West; communication between East and West, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction
